activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis of Beauty
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the concept of beauty in the poem
steps: Examine how physical beauty is portrayed
Discuss whether beauty influences love
Write a detailed paragraph explaining your view

activities_projects.title: Philosophical Message
activities_projects.objective: Understand the philosophical idea in the poem
steps: Identify the deeper philosophical message
Explain how the poet conveys it
Support your explanation with examples

activities_projects.title: Symbolism of Hair
steps: Explain why hair is repeatedly mentioned
Discuss its symbolic meaning in the poem

activities_projects.title: Interpret the Ending
steps: Study the last stanza
Explain how it changes the meaning of the poem

activities_projects.title: Love vs Appearance Debate
steps: Discuss whether love can exist beyond appearance
Write your argument in 6–7 sentences

activities_projects.title: Character Perspective Analysis
steps: Analyse the attitude of the young man
Analyse the response of Anne Gregory
Explain whose argument is stronger

activities_projects.title: Literary Style Study
steps: Observe rhyme and structure
Explain how the structure supports the poem’s message

activities_projects.title: Compare with Real Life
steps: Think about how society values beauty
Write a paragraph comparing the poem’s message with real-life situations

activities_projects.title: Extended Interpretation
steps: Explain how the poem questions superficial attraction
Support your answer with examples

activities_projects.title: Essay on True Love
steps: Write a short essay (8–10 sentences)
Discuss whether true love depends on physical appearance
